unmatchedSentences.text: That would see capacity increase almost threefold to 119,000 acret or nearly 150 million cub m enough to supply 72,000 homes with water every year. What that led to is a ginormous project to build a 131 ft dam raise on top of a 340 ft tall dam.

longSentences.text: That would see capacity increase almost threefold to 119,000 acret or nearly 150 million cub m enough to supply 72,000 homes with water every year. What that led to is a ginormous project to build a 131 ft dam raise on top of a 340 ft tall dam.
